body:
kotabutch:

“i’ve wanted you for so long.”

“that’s it, beautiful. let me get this off for you.”

“thereeeee she is.”

“tell me where you want my hands.”

“nooooo. i said tell me. words.”

“good girl. see, that was soooo easy.”

“if you ask, i’ll always give to you. i can’t deny you anything, babylove.”

“easy. you’re doing just fine. even if you don’t realize it just yet.”

“hold on to me. here. squeeze nice and tight. i’m not going anywhere.”

“there you go, sweetheart. that’s much better, see? you listen soooo well.”

“you’re allowed to want things. you just don’t need to be in charge of them.”

“turn that smart brain off, sweet girl. let me handle this.”
